arts.ttl: “I’m told…”: Chelsea keen on 26-year-old Englishman who would be open to joining them
arts.sum: Chelsea are interested in signing a quality goalkeeper at the end of the season, and they are looking at multiple options ahead of the summer transfer window. Former Premier League scout Mick Brown has now revealed that Chelsea are looking at the 26-year-old Southampton goalkeeper Aaron Ramsdale, and they would be willing to sign him […] The post “I’m told…”: Chelsea keen on 26-year-old Englishman who would be open to joining them appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea eye €50m star as ‘official negotiations’ prepared
arts.sum: The Slovakian defender has been in the spotlight of Serie A club for some time, but now seems to have caught the eye of some of England’s biggest teams. The London club sees the Feyenoord defender as a potential reinforcement for the coming summer, TEAMtalk reports.
